prompt: Defend a genuinely unpopular or unfashionable opinion that you actually hold. Not a strawman — something you'd stand by.
response: I believe that physical, printed books will never be replaced by e-books or digital formats. I find the tactile experience of holding a book, turning its pages, and smelling the paper to be an essential part of the reading experience. Additionally, I appreciate the sense of accomplishment that comes from completing a physical book and seeing my progress marked on a physical page counter. E-books may be more convenient and environmentally friendly, but they lack the personal connection and tangible satisfaction that physical books provide.
